title: city2graph TP-IPT decision analysis layer, H3 resolution 9

top_10_h3.dominant_drivers: Transport Access; Essential Services; City2Graph network penalty
top_10_h3.typology_reason: High Priority H3 cell in Masate: Essential Services Desert; top drivers are Transport Access; Essential Services; City2Graph network penalty.

transit_dependency.recommended_gtfs_action: Add feeder service or new stop coverage before scoring this cell as transit-served.

top_10_h3.suggested_intervention_family: Improve bus frequency and evening/weekend coverage near weak PTAL cells; Add mobile or satellite essential-service access points for healthcare, food, or schools; Prioritize pedestrian permeability: crossings, missing links, station approaches, and barrier removal
top_10_h3.local_validation_needs: Validate GTFS/NeTEx service availability, walking-network detours, and local service capacity before implementation.
top_10_h3.possible_kpis: PT frequency uplift; reachable essential services; walking detour reduction; route redundancy; vulnerable residents reached.
caveats: Priority score is shown as full-map normalized intervention_priority_score for dashboard display.
intervention_priority_formula_score preserves the raw formula score before normalization.
city2graph evidence supports interpretation and validation; it does not replace the formula score.
top_10_h3.report_ready_paragraph: High Priority H3 cell in Masate: Essential Services Desert; top drivers are Transport Access; Essential Services; City2Graph network penalty.

Dashboard, report and Ask AI use the normalized score for display while preserving the raw formula score in context.
